name: seo-geo
description: Two skills that work together for full page optimization: on-page-seo (rank in classic Google / Bing — intent, keywords, title, meta, headings, internal links) and ai-seo / GEO (get retrieved and cited inside AI answers — ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews, Gemini, Copilot, Claude), including a MENA / Arabic playbook.
